# Replace With Chapter Title

## Executive Summary

State the main takeaway in plain language. This section should let a busy reader recover the
chapter's core idea in under a minute.

## Why This Is Worth Understanding (Optional)

Explain why this concept matters. Workplace transfer is one valid frame, but not the only one:
use conceptual importance, historical leverage, aesthetic power, or practical decision impact
whichever best fits the topic. Omit this section entirely when the chapter works better without it.

## Core Model Or Framework

Present the main mental model, structure, or decision lens. Keep this section concrete.

## Worked Example

Walk through one realistic example end to end. Show what the reader should notice, what they
should ignore, and what conclusion follows.

## Failure Modes

- Common mistake or shallow interpretation.
- Boundary condition where the model breaks.
- Incentive or measurement problem that distorts use in practice.

## Checkpoint

- Prompt 1: Ask the reader to apply the model to a fresh situation.
- Prompt 2: Ask the reader to distinguish this concept from an adjacent one.

## Next-Step Connections

- Link to one prerequisite or adjacent chapter.
- Link to one follow-on chapter or applied module.
